---
title: "Resume"
---

::: {.resume-page}
::: {.page-intro}
A one-page snapshot of my background, experience, and current coursework. You can view the PDF here, open it in a new tab, or download a copy.
:::

::: {.resume-actions}
[Open PDF](files/resume.pdf){.resume-button target="_blank"}
[Download Resume](files/resume.pdf){.resume-button .resume-button-secondary download="Kelun_Wang_Resume.pdf"}
:::

::: {.resume-shell}
{{< pdf files/resume.pdf width=100% height=1180 class="resume-viewer" >}}
:::
:::
